3037340.name: Unholy Legacy
3037340.description:
Something evil has awoken, something ancient. An unholy force lurks in the shadows and the darkness of night. As fate would have it, you must now face this evil. To survive, you must fight, solve puzzles, and unravel the mystery of this ancient and unholy legacy.

Unholy Legacy is a first-person horror shooter with survival elements and light puzzles. Explore various environments, fight zombies and other evil creatures, and piece together the cause of it all in this living nightmare.

"Unholy Legacy is still early in development. The store page will be updated with more details and pictures from the game as development progresses."
3037340.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
